svg.title: ALIUS sprouting animated vector logo
svg.desc: ALIUS logo recreated as pure SVG: removable procedural smoke, 857-frame-smoothed organic leaf growth, feathered text reveal, and path-keyframed leaf sway.

g.desc: Optional procedural smoke layer inspired by the MP4 intro. This group can be removed or hidden without affecting the leaf sprout, text reveal, or wind sway.

svg.title: ALIUS gusting vector leaf mark
svg.desc: Three vector leaf paths animated with SVG path keyframes that fluctuate between weak and strong wind; overlap tones are produced by multiply blending, not embedded bitmap frames.
